title: ‘Tangled’: ‘Andor’ Star Diego Luna Joins Disney Live Action Remake
content:
ByBrent Lang

Executive Editor

Having wrapped up his run on “Andor,”Diego Lunais moving from one part of the Disney empire to another.

The “Star Wars” actor will appear in the the studio’s live action adaptation of “Tangled” alongside Teagan Croft (“Titans”), Milo Manheim (“Zombies”) and Kathryn Hahn (“The Studio”). For those unfamiliar with the 2010 animated feature of the same name, it’s a retelling of the Brothers Grimm fairytale story of Rapunzel, she of the “let down your hair” fame. The original film grossed over $591 million worldwide and spawned a Disney Channel series. Luna will appear in an all-new role that’s been created for the film, but there’s a decent chance his character will appreciate an impressive coiffure.

Michael Gracey, who directed the musical smash “The Greatest Showman,” will direct the feature from a screenplay by Jennifer Kaytin Robinson (“I Know What You Did Last Summer”) and Michael Montemayor (“Everyone I Love Is Dead”). Kristin Burr will produce for Burr! Productions and Jessica Virtue, EVP of production, is overseeing the project for Disney Live Action. Filming is set to commence in Spain this June. A release date has not yet been announced.

Luna is an acclaimed actor, director, and producer known for his roles in “Y Tu Mamá También,” “La Máquina” and “Rogue One: A Star Wars Story.” His next film, which he directed and co-wrote, “Ashes” is adapted from an acclaimed Spanish-language novel. It will premiere at the 2026 Cannes Film Festival. Luna will also star in Netflix’s upcoming “Mexico 86” which tells the true story of a government official, Martin de la Torre, who negotiated Mexico’s hosting of the 1986 World Cup. He also recently wrapped production on the film “Eleven Days,” in which he stars. Luna co-founded the production company La Corriente del Golfo with Gael García Bernal.

Luna is represented by WME and ID PR. The Hollywood Reporter broke the news of Luna’s casting.
title_zh: 《魔髮奇緣》(Tangled) 的《安多》(Andor) 明星迭戈·盧納(Diego Luna) 加入迪士尼(Disney) 直播動作重拍。
content_zh:
作者：布倫特·朗(Brent Lang)

執行編輯

在完成《安道爾(Andor)》的拍攝後，迭戈·盧納(Diego Luna)將從迪士尼帝國的一個部分轉移到另一個部分。

這位《星際大戰(Star Wars)》演員將在工作室的真人版改編電影《魔髮奇緣(Tangled)》中出演，與泰根·克羅夫特(Teagan Croft)（《泰坦(Titans)》）、米洛·曼海姆(Milo Manheim)（《喪屍(Zombies)》）和凱瑟琳·哈恩(Kathryn Hahn)（《工作室(The Studio)》）同台演出。對於不熟悉2010年同名動畫電影的人來說，這部影片是格林兄弟童話《長髮公主》的重新詮釋，講述了那位以「放下你的頭髮」而聞名的公主。原版電影在全球票房超過5.91億美元，並衍生出一部迪士尼頻道系列劇。盧納將在電影中出演一個全新角色，這個角色是為電影創造的，但他的角色很可能會欣賞一頭令人印象深刻的髮型。

執導過音樂大片《大娛樂家(The Greatest Showman)》的邁克爾·格雷西(Michael Gracey)將執導這部電影，劇本由詹妮弗·凱廷·羅賓森(Jennifer Kaytin Robinson)（《我知道你去年夏天做了什麼(I Know What You Did Last Summer)》）和邁克爾·蒙特馬約(Michael Montemayor)（《我愛的每一個人都死了(Everyone I Love Is Dead)》）共同撰寫。克里斯汀·伯爾(Kristin Burr)將為Burr! Productions製作，迪士尼真人版的製作執行副總裁傑西卡·維爾丘(Jessica Virtue)將監督該項目。拍攝計劃於今年六月在西班牙開始，尚未公布上映日期。

盧納是一位備受讚譽的演員、導演和製片人，以在《你媽媽也一樣(Y Tu Mamá También)》、《機器人La Máquina》和《俠盜一號(Rogue One: A Star Wars Story)》中的角色而聞名。他的下一部電影《灰燼(Ashes)》是根據一部備受讚譽的西班牙語小說改編的，盧納擔任導演並共同編劇。該片將於2026年戛納電影節首映。盧納還將主演Netflix即將推出的《墨西哥86(Mexico 86)》，該片講述了政府官員馬丁·德拉·托雷(Martin de la Torre)談判墨西哥主辦1986年世界杯的真實故事。他最近還完成了電影《十一天(Eleven Days)》的製作，並在其中主演。盧納與蓋爾·加西亞·貝納爾(Gael García Bernal)共同創立了製作公司La Corriente del Golfo。

盧納由WME和ID PR代理。《好萊塢報導(Hollywood Reporter)》首次報導了盧納的選角消息。
